metadata.title: Home | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Manage subscriptions, accounting, team operations, and business growth from one connected ERP platform.

hero.tag: ✦ Manage your entire business in one place
hero.description: Set up in minutes with no coding or complicated configuration. Manage your team, sales, accounting, and operations from one connected platform.

apps.title: Manage everything with
apps.description: Keep accounting, sales, customer management, inventory, and team workflows connected in one system. Reduce manual work, avoid mistakes, and make faster business decisions.

nativeAi.title: AI support across your entire business
nativeAi.description: Generate reports, understand data, automate tasks, and make faster decisions with built-in AI assistance.

levelUp.description: Enjoy fast workflows, clean interfaces, and smart suggestions that help your team complete more work in less time.

cards.title: Automated renewals
cards.desc: Renew contracts and invoices automatically without manual tracking.

cards.title: Customer portal
cards.desc: Let customers view plans, invoices, and payment history securely.

cards.title: Recurring invoices
cards.desc: Generate invoices based on billing cycles and contract rules.

cards.title: Payment automation
cards.desc: Collect payments, retry failed charges, keep billing updated.

cards.title: Revenue analytics
cards.desc: Track MRR, ARR, churn, renewals, and lifetime value in real time.

cards.title: Retention flows
cards.desc: Trigger smart follow-ups before renewals or cancellation risks.

cards.title: Flexible for every business
cards.desc: Whether you're a startup or a large company, Adon adapts to the way your team works.

cards.title: Your data stays yours
cards.desc: Keep your business data secure with full control. Use our cloud or host it on your own infrastructure.

cards.title: AI that helps you work smarter
cards.desc: Use AI assistance for reporting, analysis, automation, and faster decision-making across your business.

cards.title: Simple pricing
cards.desc: No hidden fees or complicated plans. Transparent pricing designed for growing businesses.

testimonials.title: Teams love using Adon

items.name: Nazmus Sadat
items.quote: Adon ERP cut our billing time by 70%. Every invoice runs itself now.

items.name: David Rayan
items.quote: The accounting module alone replaced three separate tools we used.

items.name: Md Mosarouf Hossain
items.quote: We grew 3× without hiring extra finance staff. That says it all.

testimonials.extraQuote: Adon helped us simplify accounting, sales, and team management in one place. Instead of juggling multiple tools, everything is now connected and much easier to manage.

cta.title: Take your business to the next level
cta.description: Manage billing, payments, renewals, customer relationships, and reporting from one unified platform with Adon ERP.
